expectedIssues: Top nav button is missing text
reportedIssues: The top-right button/CTA element appears to be broken or missing its label — it renders as a plain yellow/orange rectangle with no visible text.
The fine print/disclaimer text at the bottom of the page is being overlapped by the 'SCROLL DOWN' banner/button, making portions of the legal text unreadable.
The fine print text in the disclaimer section is extremely small and difficult to read, especially on mobile viewports.

expected.reasoning: Reported issue 0 describes a top-right button element missing its visible text label, matching the expected defect of a top nav button missing text.
